news-global-econ.description:
Venezuelan police officers attempted to steal a box of U.S. dollars from the ruins of a collapsed building in La Guaira.

news-global-econ.title: Russian generals' assassinations expose growing rift inside Putin's security apparatus
news-global-econ.description: Internal frictions between the FSB and Russian military are growing as generals demand protection amid a wave of assassinations, sources say.

news-global-econ.title: RNC chair predicts first-ever midterm convention will turn Dallas into ‘Trumpapalooza’ for 2026 fight
news-global-econ.description: RNC chair Joe Gruters predicts Republicans will dominate at the party's first-ever midterm convention, calling the Dallas event a "Trumpapalooza."

news-global-soc.description: Milot Kiros, who defeated Rep. Diana DeGette in Denver, called 9/11 an inevitable consequence of American foreign policy in the Middle East.
